§6Kerosene§f

§aAn aviation-grade fuel powering jetpacks, rockets, and spacecraft — your ticket to the skies and beyond!§f

Kerosene is a high-energy, aviation-grade fuel providing §e2.56 MTU§f and §e3.85 MHE§f per bucket. It is primarily obtained by fractioning §bLight Oil§f or cracking §bDiesel§f in the §bCatalytic Cracking Tower§f.

§6Production§f:
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (from Light Oil): §e100mB§f Light Oil → §e40mB§f Diesel + §e60mB§f Kerosene.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (from Vacuum Light Oil): §e100mB§f → §e70mB§f Kerosene + §e30mB§f Reformate Gas.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (from Cracked Light Oil): §e100mB§f → §e70mB§f Kerosene + §e30mB§f Petroleum Gas.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f (from Diesel/Cracked Diesel): §e100mB§f + Steam → §e40mB§f Kerosene + byproducts.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §e3 of 4§f jetpack types: Fuel with up to §e16,000mB§f each.
§b• Soyuz Launch§f: Requires §e128,000mB§f to launch.
§b• Jet Fuel§f: §e100mB§f Reformate + §e900mB§f Kerosene in §bIndustrial Mixer§f → §e1,000mB§f Jet Fuel.
§b• BF Rocket Fuel§f: §e6,000mB§f Kerosene + §e1×§f Balefire Shard in §bChemical Plant§f.
§b• NITAN Super Fuel§f: §e600mB§f Kerosene + §e200mB§f Mercury + Nitanium Blend.
§b• Assembly Machines§f: Required for Asteroid Mining Ships, Lunar Mining Ships, and Satellite Bases.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: Crack §e100mB§f → §e60mB§f Petroleum Gas.

§eTip§f: Kerosene is the only fuel that can power advanced transportation. Always keep a stock for §bjetpack§f refueling and Soyuz launches! The §bChainsaw§f also accepts Kerosene (up to §e5,000mB§f).
